Show / Hide Table of Contents

Class LocalTenantStorageProvider

Tenant-isolated local disk storage provider. Stores files under {BasePath}/tenant-{tenantId}/{path}. Use for development, single-server deployments, or CI environments.

object

Implements

Type Name Description
TenantStoragePathBuilder pathBuilder

The tenant-aware path builder.
string basePath

Root directory on disk. Defaults to ./tenant-storage.

ListAsync(string?, CancellationToken)

Lists all files under the given prefix (within the current tenant's namespace).

Type Name Description
string prefix

Optional path prefix to filter results.
CancellationToken cancellationToken

Cancellation token.

UploadAsync(string, Stream, string?, CancellationToken)

Uploads a file. The path is automatically prefixed with the tenant ID.

Declaration

Type Name Description
string path

Logical path (e.g., "invoices/jan.pdf").
Stream content

string contentType

The full storage path including tenant prefix.
